title: Basic JavaScript Web Workers
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Web Workers. Focus on implementing Web Worker creation correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Web Workers
description: Create a function that uses Web Worker creation and postMessage communication together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Web Workers Project
description: Build a small application that applies Web Worker creation, postMessage communication, onmessage event handler in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Web Workers
description: The following code has bugs related to Web Worker creation. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Web Workers
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Web Worker creation and postMessage communication.
